# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

Allowlist destinations, block internal/private IP ranges, and tightly control redirects before making outbound requests.
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

// Allowlisted domains for link previews
const allowlistedDomains = ['example.com', 'facebook.com'];

// Blocked IP ranges
const blockedIPRanges = ['192.168.', '10.0.'];

// Function to extract metadata from HTML content
function extractMetadata(html: string): { title: string; description: string } {
  const parser = new DOMParser();
  const doc = parser.parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
  return {
    title: doc.querySelector('title')?.textContent || '',
    description: doc.querySelector('meta[name="description"]')?.getAttribute('content') || '',
  };
}

// Function to fetch website metadata
async function fetchMetadata(url: string): Promise<{ title: string; description: string }> {
  try {
    const response = await axios.get(url);
    return extractMetadata(response.data);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    throw error;
  }
}

app.post('/link-preview', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  if (!req.body.url) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'URL is required' });
  }

  const url = req.body.url;

  // Check if URL is allowlisted
  if (allowlistedDomains.includes(url.split('.')[0])) {
    try {
      const metadata = await fetchMetadata(url);
      return res.json(metadata);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch metadata' });
    }
  }

  // Check if IP is blocked
  const ip = req.ip;
  for (const range of blockedIPRanges) {
    if (ip.startsWith(range)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Blocked IP range' });
    }
  }

  try {
    const metadata = await fetchMetadata(url);
    return res.json(metadata);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch metadata' });
  }
});

app.listen(3000, () => {
  console.log('Server listening on port 3000');
});
